```{r}
library(phyloseq)
library(microbiome)
library(ggplot2)
library(vegan)
library(ggpubr)
library(grid)
library(PNWColors)
library(gridExtra)
library(dplyr)

# Helper function to extract legend (from your code)
g_legend <- function(a.gplot) {
  tmp <- ggplot_gtable(ggplot_build(a.gplot))
  leg <- which(sapply(tmp$grobs, function(x) x$name) == "guide-box")
  if (length(leg) > 0) {
    tmp$grobs[[leg]]
  } else {
    NULL
  }
}

# EXACTLY your function for beta-diversity plots (preserving layout)
create_ordination_plots <- function(ps_obj, method = "PCoA", distance_method = "wunifrac", 
                                    group, size = 10, palette, title = "") {
  
  # Calculate distance matrix
  dist <- phyloseq::distance(ps_obj, method = distance_method)
  # Perform ordination
  ordination <- ordinate(ps_obj, method = method, distance = dist)
  P <- cbind(as.data.frame(ordination$vectors), as.data.frame(as.matrix(sample_data(ps_obj))))
  
  # Ensure axes are numeric
  P$Axis.1 <- as.numeric(as.character(P$Axis.1))
  P$Axis.2 <- as.numeric(as.character(P$Axis.2))
  
  # Variance explained
  variance_explained <- 100 * ordination$values$Relative_eig[1:2]
  
  # Means per group
  means <- P %>%
    group_by(!!rlang::sym(group)) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_Axis1 = mean(Axis.1, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_Axis2 = mean(Axis.2, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  
  # Merge means
  P <- P %>%
    dplyr::left_join(means, by = c(group))
  
  # ANOSIM
  anosim_res <- anosim(dist, P[[group]])
  anosim_text <- paste("ANOSIM R:", round(anosim_res$statistic, 3), 
                       "p-value:", round(anosim_res$signif, 3))
  
  # Plot ordination with title
  pl <- ggplot(P, aes_string(x = "Axis.1", y = "Axis.2", color = group)) +
    geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.8) +
    stat_ellipse() +
    geom_segment(aes(x = Axis.1, y = Axis.2, xend = mean_Axis1, yend = mean_Axis2), alpha = 0.3) +
    geom_label(data = means, aes(x = mean_Axis1, y = mean_Axis2, label = !!rlang::sym(group)),
               fill = "white", color = "black", fontface = "bold", size = 7) +
    geom_text(x = Inf, y = Inf, label = anosim_text, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, size = size-7, color = "black") +
    scale_color_manual(values = palette) +
    xlab(paste0('PCoA component 1 [', round(variance_explained[1], 1), '%]')) +
    ylab(paste0('PCoA component 2 [', round(variance_explained[2], 1), '%]')) +
    ggtitle(title) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      legend.position = "right",
      text = element_text(size = size, color = 'black'),
      panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = size+10, color='black'),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = size+10, color='black'),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size=25),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size=25),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black"),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(size = 0.1, linetype = 'solid', color = "gray"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_line(size = 0.1, linetype = 'solid', color = "gray"),
      legend.key.size = unit(2.0, "cm"),
      legend.text=element_text(size=20),
      legend.title = element_text(size=20)
    )
  legend <- g_legend(pl)
  pl <- pl + theme(legend.position="none")
  
  # Pairwise comparisons for Wilcoxon tests
  unique_vals <- unique(P[[group]])
  my_comparisons <- combn(unique_vals, 2, simplify = FALSE) %>% lapply(as.vector)
  
  # Density plots for Axis.1
  x_dens <- ggplot(P, aes_string(x = "Axis.1", y = group, color = group)) +
    geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.1) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.75) +
    geom_jitter(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = palette) +
    theme(
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = size+10),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, size = size+10, color = 'black'),
      legend.position = "none",
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black"),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(size = 0.1, linetype = 'solid', color = "gray"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_line(size = 0.1, linetype = 'solid', color = "gray")
    ) +
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, method = "wilcox.test",
                       label = "p.signif", y.position = max(P$Axis.1) * 1.1, size = size-5)
  
  # Density plots for Axis.2
  y_dens <- ggplot(P, aes_string(x = "Axis.2", y = group, color = group)) + coord_flip() +
    geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.1) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.75) +
    geom_jitter(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = palette) +
    theme(
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = size+10),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, size = size+10, color = 'black'),
      legend.position = "none",
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black"),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(size = 0.1, linetype = 'solid', color = "gray"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_line(size = 0.1, linetype = 'solid', color = "gray")
    ) +
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, method = "wilcox.test",
                       label = "p.signif", y.position = max(P$Axis.2) * 1.1, size = size-5)
  
  # theme
  theme_new <- theme_classic() + 
    theme(plot.margin=unit(c(1.5,1.5,1.5,1.5), "cm"), text=element_text(size=20))
  
  theme_set(theme_new)
  
  # Convert to grobs
  gA <- ggplotGrob(x_dens)
  gB <- ggplotGrob(pl)
  gD <- ggplotGrob(y_dens)
  gL <- legend
  
  # Set widths - THIS IS CRITICAL FOR ALIGNMENT
  xWidth = unit.pmax(gB$widths)
  yHeight = unit.pmax(gB$heights)
  gA$widths <- xWidth
  gA$heights[2:5] <- yHeight
  gB$widths <- xWidth
  gB$heights <- yHeight
  gD$widths[2:5] <- xWidth
  gD$heights <- yHeight
  
  # Arrange plots - EXACTLY your layout
  final_grob <- arrangeGrob(gD, gB, gL, gA, 
                           ncol=2, nrow=2, 
                           widths=c(7, 8), heights=c(8, 7))
  
  return(final_grob)
}

# Wrapper function with error handling
create_beta_plot_safe <- function(ps_obj, group, palette, title, distance_method = "wunifrac") {
  # Check if we have enough samples and groups
  if (nsamples(ps_obj) < 3) {
    warning(paste("Not enough samples (n =", nsamples(ps_obj), ") for beta diversity. Skipping."))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  unique_groups <- unique(sample_data(ps_obj)[[group]])
  if (length(unique_groups) < 2) {
    warning(paste("Group variable has only 1 level:", unique_groups, ". Skipping."))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  tryCatch({
    # Create the plot with EXACT layout
    plot_grob <- create_ordination_plots(
      ps_obj = ps_obj,
      method = "PCoA",
      distance_method = distance_method,
      group = group,
      size = 10,
      palette = palette,
      title = title
    )
    
    return(plot_grob)
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    message(paste("Error creating beta diversity plot:", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
}

# Main analysis function
run_beta_diversity_analysis <- function(
    ps_obj,
    categorical_vars,
    output_dir = "/home/sonec_iv/beta_diversity_by_variable",
    distance_method = "wunifrac"
) {
  
  # Create output directory
  dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # Get unique groups and timepoints
  groups <- sort(unique(ps_obj@sam_data$Group))
  timepoints <- sort(unique(ps_obj@sam_data$Timepoint))
  
  # Define color palettes (SAME as alpha diversity)
  groupA_colors <- c("-1" = "#FF9999", "-2" = "#FF3333")
  groupB_colors <- c("-1" = "#99CCFF", "-2" = "#3366FF")
  groupC_colors <- c("-1" = "#99FF99", "-2" = "#33CC33")
  
  group_palette_time1 <- c("A" = "#FF9999", "B" = "#99CCFF", "C" = "#99FF99")
  group_palette_time2 <- c("A" = "#FF3333", "B" = "#3366FF", "C" = "#33CC33")
  
  timepoint_palettes <- list(
    "A" = groupA_colors,
    "B" = groupB_colors,
    "C" = groupC_colors
  )
  
  # Loop through each categorical variable
  for (col in categorical_vars) {
    cat("\nProcessing variable:", col, "\n")
    
    # Create subdirectory for this variable
    var_dir <- file.path(output_dir, col)
    dir.create(var_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
    
    # Skip if not enough unique values
    if (length(unique(ps_obj@sam_data[[col]])) < 2) {
      cat("  Skipping - less than 2 unique values\n")
      next
    }
    
    # Store plots for this variable
    var_plots <- list()
    
    # PLOT 1: Groups A vs B vs C in Timepoint -1
    cat("  Creating Plot 1: Groups in Timepoint -1\n")
    ps_time1 <- subset_samples(ps_obj, Timepoint == "-1")
    
    if (nsamples(ps_time1) >= 3 && length(unique(ps_time1@sam_data$Group)) >= 2) {
      p1 <- create_beta_plot_safe(
        ps_obj = ps_time1,
        group = "Group",
        palette = group_palette_time1,
        title = paste(col, "- Groups in Timepoint -1"),
        distance_method = distance_method
      )
      
      if (!is.null(p1)) {
        # Save plot - using ggsave with grid object
        png_file <- file.path(var_dir, paste0(col, "_1_groups_timepoint-1.png"))
        png(png_file, width = 16, height = 12, units = "in", res = 300)
        grid.draw(p1)
        dev.off()
        
        var_plots[[1]] <- p1
        cat("    Saved:", basename(png_file), "\n")
      }
    }
    
    # PLOT 2: Groups A vs B vs C in Timepoint -2
    cat("  Creating Plot 2: Groups in Timepoint -2\n")
    ps_time2 <- subset_samples(ps_obj, Timepoint == "-2")
    
    if (nsamples(ps_time2) >= 3 && length(unique(ps_time2@sam_data$Group)) >= 2) {
      p2 <- create_beta_plot_safe(
        ps_obj = ps_time2,
        group = "Group",
        palette = group_palette_time2,
        title = paste(col, "- Groups in Timepoint -2"),
        distance_method = distance_method
      )
      
      if (!is.null(p2)) {
        png_file <- file.path(var_dir, paste0(col, "_2_groups_timepoint-2.png"))
        png(png_file, width = 16, height = 12, units = "in", res = 300)
        grid.draw(p2)
        dev.off()
        
        var_plots[[2]] <- p2
        cat("    Saved:", basename(png_file), "\n")
      }
    }
    
    # PLOT 3: Group A - Timepoint -1 vs -2
    cat("  Creating Plot 3: Group A timepoints\n")
    ps_groupA <- subset_samples(ps_obj, Group == "A")
    
    if (nsamples(ps_groupA) >= 3 && length(unique(ps_groupA@sam_data$Timepoint)) >= 2) {
      p3 <- create_beta_plot_safe(
        ps_obj = ps_groupA,
        group = "Timepoint",
        palette = timepoint_palettes[["A"]],
        title = paste(col, "- Group A: Timepoints -1 vs -2"),
        distance_method = distance_method
      )
      
      if (!is.null(p3)) {
        png_file <- file.path(var_dir, paste0(col, "_3_groupA_timepoints.png"))
        png(png_file, width = 16, height = 12, units = "in", res = 300)
        grid.draw(p3)
        dev.off()
        
        var_plots[[3]] <- p3
        cat("    Saved:", basename(png_file), "\n")
      }
    }
    
    # PLOT 4: Group B - Timepoint -1 vs -2
    cat("  Creating Plot 4: Group B timepoints\n")
    ps_groupB <- subset_samples(ps_obj, Group == "B")
    
    if (nsamples(ps_groupB) >= 3 && length(unique(ps_groupB@sam_data$Timepoint)) >= 2) {
      p4 <- create_beta_plot_safe(
        ps_obj = ps_groupB,
        group = "Timepoint",
        palette = timepoint_palettes[["B"]],
        title = paste(col, "- Group B: Timepoints -1 vs -2"),
        distance_method = distance_method
      )
      
      if (!is.null(p4)) {
        png_file <- file.path(var_dir, paste0(col, "_4_groupB_timepoints.png"))
        png(png_file, width = 16, height = 12, units = "in", res = 300)
        grid.draw(p4)
        dev.off()
        
        var_plots[[4]] <- p4
        cat("    Saved:", basename(png_file), "\n")
      }
    }
    
    # PLOT 5: Group C - Timepoint -1 vs -2
    cat("  Creating Plot 5: Group C timepoints\n")
    ps_groupC <- subset_samples(ps_obj, Group == "C")
    
    if (nsamples(ps_groupC) >= 3 && length(unique(ps_groupC@sam_data$Timepoint)) >= 2) {
      p5 <- create_beta_plot_safe(
        ps_obj = ps_groupC,
        group = "Timepoint",
        palette = timepoint_palettes[["C"]],
        title = paste(col, "- Group C: Timepoints -1 vs -2"),
        distance_method = distance_method
      )
      
      if (!is.null(p5)) {
        png_file <- file.path(var_dir, paste0(col, "_5_groupC_timepoints.png"))
        png(png_file, width = 16, height = 12, units = "in", res = 300)
        grid.draw(p5)
        dev.off()
        
        var_plots[[5]] <- p5
        cat("    Saved:", basename(png_file), "\n")
      }
    }
    
    # PLOT 6: Beta diversity by the categorical variable itself
    cat("  Creating Plot 6: Variable distribution\n")
    unique_vals <- unique(ps_obj@sam_data[[col]])
    
    if (length(unique_vals) >= 2 && nsamples(ps_obj) >= 3) {
      # Create palette for this variable
      n_colors <- length(unique_vals)
      if (n_colors <= 8) {
        var_palette <- pnw_palette("Sunset2", n_colors, type = "continuous")
      } else {
        var_palette <- pnw_palette("Sunset2", 8, type = "continuous")
        var_palette <- colorRampPalette(var_palette)(n_colors)
      }
      names(var_palette) <- unique_vals
      
      p6 <- create_beta_plot_safe(
        ps_obj = ps_obj,
        group = col,
        palette = var_palette,
        title = paste(col, "- Beta Diversity Distribution"),
        distance_method = distance_method
      )
      
      if (!is.null(p6)) {
        png_file <- file.path(var_dir, paste0(col, "_6_variable_distribution.png"))
        png(png_file, width = 16, height = 12, units = "in", res = 300)
        grid.draw(p6)
        dev.off()
        
        var_plots[[6]] <- p6
        cat("    Saved:", basename(png_file), "\n")
      }
    }
    
    # Create a combined grid of all plots for this variable
    cat("  Creating combined grid\n")
    
    # Remove NULL plots
    var_plots <- var_plots[!sapply(var_plots, is.null)]
    
    # Create combined grid if we have plots
    if (length(var_plots) > 0) {
      # Calculate grid dimensions
      ncols <- min(2, length(var_plots))
      nrows <- ceiling(length(var_plots) / ncols)
      
      # Create combined plot with uniform sizing
      combined_grob <- arrangeGrob(
        grobs = var_plots,
        ncol = ncols,
        nrow = nrows,
        top = textGrob(paste("Beta Diversity Analysis for Variable:", col), 
                      gp = gpar(fontsize = 18, fontface = "bold"))
      )
      
      # Save combined plot
      combined_file <- file.path(var_dir, paste0(col, "_combined_grid.png"))
      png(combined_file, 
          width = ncols * 16, 
          height = nrows * 12, 
          units = "in", res = 300)
      grid.draw(combined_grob)
      dev.off()
      
      cat("    Saved combined grid:", basename(combined_file), "\n")
    }
    
    cat("  Completed beta diversity analysis for variable:", col, "\n")
  }
  
  cat("\n=== BETA DIVERSITY ANALYSIS COMPLETE ===\n")
  cat("All plots saved in:", output_dir, "\n")
  cat("For each categorical variable, you should find:\n")
  cat("1. Variable_1_groups_timepoint-1.png\n")
  cat("2. Variable_2_groups_timepoint-2.png\n")
  cat("3. Variable_3_groupA_timepoints.png\n")
  cat("4. Variable_4_groupB_timepoints.png\n")
  cat("5. Variable_5_groupC_timepoints.png\n")
  cat("6. Variable_6_variable_distribution.png\n")
  cat("7. Variable_combined_grid.png\n")
}

# Main execution
# Read phyloseq object
#ps <- readRDS('/home/sonec_iv/RSF_res_4_ps/RSF_all_physeq_wgs_COUNTS.rds')
ps <- readRDS('/home/sonec_iv/RSF_res_4_ps/hm3/RSF_ps_humann_joint.rds')
#ps <- readRDS('/home/sonec_iv/RSF_res_4_ps/RSF_ps_mags.rds')
# Prepare the phyloseq object (same as alpha diversity)
#level <- 'Species'
det <- 1/100
prev <- 10/100

taxas <- core_members(ps, detection = det, prevalence = prev, include.lowest = FALSE)
ps_filt <- prune_taxa(taxas, ps)
#ps_filt <- speedyseq::tax_glom(ps_filt, taxrank = level, NArm = TRUE)

# Define categorical variables
meta <- ps_filt@sam_data
meta$Batch <- as.factor(meta$Batch)
categorical_vars <- names(meta)[sapply(meta, function(x) is.factor(x) || is.character(x))]
categorical_vars <- setdiff(categorical_vars, c('Age', "Group", 'Height', 'No_Patient', 
                                                'Weight', 'Timepoint', 'Asthma_Treatment_Drugs', 'SampleID'))

# Run beta diversity analysis with weighted UniFrac
cat("Starting beta diversity analysis with weighted UniFrac...\n")
run_beta_diversity_analysis(
  ps_obj = ps_filt,
  categorical_vars = categorical_vars,
  output_dir = "/home/sonec_iv/beta_diversity_PATHS_wunifrac",
  distance_method = "wunifrac"
)

# Optional: Run with other distance metrics
cat("\n\nStarting beta diversity analysis with Bray-Curtis...\n")
run_beta_diversity_analysis(
  ps_obj = ps_filt,
  categorical_vars = categorical_vars,
  output_dir = "/home/sonec_iv/beta_diversity_PATHS_bray",
  distance_method = "bray"
)

cat("\n\nStarting beta diversity analysis with Jaccard...\n")
run_beta_diversity_analysis(
  ps_obj = ps_filt,
  categorical_vars = categorical_vars,
  output_dir = "/home/sonec_iv/beta_diversity_PATHS_jaccard",
  distance_method = "jaccard"
)
```
